uplink.description: Status report: gang-1 open, gang-2 closed, battery 3.0 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame derived from the upstream example input (TTN r718f2 status report). reportType 0x01; byte3=30 -> 3.0 V; byte4=1 -> gang-1 open; byte5=0 -> gang-2 closed. expected.data authored to the normalized vocabulary (action.contactState + extra contactState2), not copied from upstream's Volt/status1/status2 output.

uplink.description: Status report: gang-1 closed, gang-2 open, battery 3.6 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame. byte3=36 -> 3.6 V; byte4=0 -> gang-1 closed; byte5=1 -> gang-2 open. Covers the inverse channel states from vector 1.

uplink.description: Status report: both gangs open, low battery flag set (2.8 V)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising the low-battery flag. byte3=156=0x9C -> high bit set (lowBattery true), low 7 bits 0x1C=28 -> 2.8 V; both gangs open.

uplink.description: Startup version report (fPort 6, reportType 0x00) carries no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream example input for the device-info/startup frame. reportType 0x00 carries version/datecode, not a measurement -> error.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is not a data report
uplink._note: Upstream example input for a ConfigReportRsp on fPort 7; carries no measurement -> error.
